basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 89 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education & Research (JIPMER), Puducherry
basic_details.short_information: JIPMER is recruiting 89 Senior Resident posts (Tenure – 3 Years) across 27 departments with MD/MS/DNB/MDS qualification, last date for registration 29 June 2026.

application_fee.details: Application fee must be paid online through SBI Collect only. No other mode of payment (DD/Cheque/Cash/MO etc.) will be entertained. The fee once remitted will not be refunded under any circumstances. The bank may charge an additional service charge for online payment.

age_limit.details: Upper age limit is not exceeding 45 years as on the crucial date (31-07-2026). Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | medical / surgical departments: NMC/MCI-recognized postgraduate medical degree of MD/MS/DNB in the respective discipline from a recognized University/Institute. | neonatology: DM in the concerned discipline from a recognized University/Institute or equivalent qualification. | ctvs: MS/DNB in General Surgery and MCh/DNB in CTVS are eligible. Candidates who completed MCh Vascular Surgery or DNB Vascular Surgery are also eligible. | pulmonary medicine: DM in Pulmonary Medicine from a recognized University/Institute may also apply. | dental department (dentistry – prosthodontics): DCI-recognized postgraduate dental degree of MDS (Prosthodontics & Crown and Bridge) from a recognized University/Institute. | prior senior residency: Applicants should not have completed 3 years Senior Residency under Residency Schemes in any Government Medical Institution (regular or ad hoc/contract basis). Duration already completed will be reduced from the 3-year tenure offered. | crucial date for eligibility: All requirements for the qualifying degree (including passing exam and completing mandatory Junior Residency, if any) must be fulfilled by 31-07-2026.

vacancy_details.Departments: Anaesthesiology & Critical Care, Anatomy, Biochemistry, CTVS, Dentistry – Prosthodontics & Crown and Bridge, Dermatology, Emergency Medicine, ENT, General Surgery
Forensic Medicine & Toxicology, General Medicine, Geriatric Medicine, Microbiology, Neonatology, Nuclear Medicine, Orthopaedics, Pathology, PMR
Paediatrics, Obstetrics & Gynaecology, Pharmacology, Physiology, Preventive and Social Medicine, Psychiatry, Pulmonary Medicine, Radiation Oncology, Radio-Diagnosis

salary_details.pay_scale: Basic Pay Rs. 67,700/- (Level 11, Cell 1 as per 7th CPC) + NPA + Allowances (Total approx. Rs. 1,30,000/- per month in first year)

selection_process: Selection is based on a Written Test (Stage-I) followed by Interview (Stage-II). The final merit list is prepared based on 80% weightage to Written Test marks and 20% weightage to Interview marks. In case of equal marks
the elder candidate (earlier date of birth) will be ranked higher. A waiting list will be maintained and operated only if necessary; being on the waiting list provides no guarantee of appointment.

pattern_table.Details: 40 Objective Type (Single Best Response) questions from concerned specialty
No negative marking for incorrect responses

exam_pattern.details: Stage-I: Written Test (Objective Type) | Shortlisting Ratio for Interview: | Minimum Eligibility Score in Written Test to qualify for Interview: | Stage-II: Interview | The Interview carries 20 marks based on performance, prizes, medals, awards, paper publications, etc. Certificate Verification will be conducted for shortlisted candidates on the same day (from 08:00 AM). Shortlisted candidates must report at Room No. G-104, Ground Floor, Administrative Block, JIPMER at 01:30 PM for the Interview at 02:00 PM. Candidates whose certificates are not found in order will not be permitted to appear for the Interview.

how_to_apply: Candidates must register through the Google Form available on the JIPMER website home page (https://www.jipmer.edu.in) and navigate to the link "RECRUITMENT TO THE POST OF SENIOR RESIDENT ON REGULAR (TENURE) BASIS AT JIPMER, PUDUCHERRY – JULY 2026". Registration must be completed on or before 29-06-2026, 04:30 PM. Candidates who fail to register before the deadline may also participate subject to submitting the Google Form and paying the prescribed fee on the morning of the Written Test (02-07-2026 to 04-07-2026) before 08:30 AM.
Documents to be Uploaded while applying (Scan as JPEG/JPG/PDF, max 1 MB each):
Age proof certificate (Birth Certificate / 10th / 12th Mark Sheet)
MBBS Degree Certificate
Internship Completion Certificate
MD/MS Provisional/Degree Certificate, DM/MCh (if applicable)
PG Course cum Conduct/Completion Certificate
Medical Council Registration (MBBS), PG and DM/MCh (if applicable)
Residence Certificate issued by Revenue Authority (not below Tahsildar/Dy. Tehsildar) or Aadhaar Card / Voter ID / Passport
SC/ST Certificate in prescribed format (Annexure-II), if applicable
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) Certificate in prescribed format (Annexure-I) not older than one year before the crucial date (31-07-2026), if applicable
EWS Certificate in prescribed format (Annexure-III) valid for current financial year, if applicable
No Objection Certificate (NOC) from present employer in prescribed format (Annexure-IV), if currently employed in Government/Semi-Government/PSU/Autonomous Body
PwBD Disability Certificate from duly constituted Medical Board in prescribed format (Annexure-V), if applicable
Documents to be Produced in Original at the time of Certificate Verification / Interview:
Proof of Date of Birth (10th/12th Passing Certificate or Birth Certificate)
MBBS/BDS Degree Certificate and Internship Certificate
MD/MS/MDS/DNB Degree or Provisional Certificate
Course cum Conduct Certificate indicating completion of Junior Residency tenure
Bonafide Certificate from Dean/Principal indicating date of completion of PG programme (for those completing on or before 31-07-2026)
Permanent Medical/Dental Registration Certificate for UG and additional registration for PG/Superspeciality (if applicable)
SC/ST, EWS (Current FY 2026-27) & OBC (latest Non-Creamy Layer) Certificate (if applicable)
No Objection Certificate (NOC) from current employer (if applicable)
3 Passport size photographs
Payment confirmation copy (SBI Collect receipt)

Photograph Specifications: Recent colour passport size photograph (30 mm × 45 mm; 20–80 KB; .jpg), with a placard showing candidate's name and date of photograph. Black & White/Polaroid not acceptable.
Signature Specifications: Black ball point pen on plain white sheet (80 mm × 35 mm; 20–80 KB; .jpg).
Apply Online at: https://www.jipmer.edu.in

Contact for Enquiry: Assistant Administrative Officer – 0413-2296022 | Email: [email protected] (Office hours: 09:00 AM–01:00 PM & 02:00 PM–04:30 PM; provide Application No. and Mobile No. in all queries)
important_instructions: Mere completion of registration and payment does not confer any right for appointment. The full name in the application must match exactly (spelling and order) with the Government Photo ID and undergraduate Degree Certificate. If there is a mismatch, get it rectified before applying. Applications without prescribed fee or incomplete in any respect will be summarily rejected. No correspondence/reconsideration for rejected applications. The application once submitted is FINAL. No changes will be entertained. If an error is found, a fresh application with a new fee payment must be submitted; the earlier application will stand cancelled automatically. OBC (NCL) Certificate must be in Central Government format (Annexure-I), must mention "does not belong to Creamy Layer", and must be issued in the current financial year. EWS Certificate must be in the format prescribed (Annexure-III) and must be valid (current FY 2026-27). SC/ST Certificate must be in the prescribed format (Annexure-II). Candidates currently employed in Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies must produce a valid NOC from their employer; without it, they will not be allowed to appear for the Interview. Candidates should not have completed 3 years of Senior Residency (regular or ad hoc/contract) in any Government Medical Institution. PwBD reservation is 4% on a horizontal basis. Minimum benchmark disability is 40%. The degree of disability will be assessed by JIPMER Medical Board, whose decision is final. Mobile phones, accessories, and other electronic gadgets are strictly prohibited inside examination premises. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the written test or interview. Selected candidates must join within 15 days of offer of appointment. Extension of 14 days may be granted in exceptional cases. No further extension will be permitted. The appointment is full-time; private practice of any kind is strictly prohibited. All information including results, interview dates, and updates will be published only on the JIPMER website (www.jipmer.edu.in). Candidates must visit regularly. Appointment is subject to being declared medically fit by JIPMER's competent Medical Board. All disputes are subject to legal jurisdiction of the Union Territory of Puducherry. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download JIPMER Senior Resident Recruitment July 2026 Official Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download JIPMER Senior Resident Recruitment July 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in JIPMER Senior Resident Recruitment July 2026?
faq.answer: There are 89 vacancies across 27 departments at JIPMER Puducherry and Karaikal campuses.

faq.question: Q2. What is the pay scale for JIPMER Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The basic pay is Rs. 67,700/- per month (Level 11, Cell 1 as per 7th CPC) plus NPA and other allowances. The total emoluments in the first year are approximately Rs. 1,30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to register for JIPMER Senior Resident July 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online registration is 29-06-2026 (04:30 PM). Candidates can also register on the morning of the Written Test (02-07-2026 to 04-07-2026) before 08:30 AM with fee payment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for JIPMER Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: MD/MS/DNB in the respective discipline (for Medical/Surgical departments), MDS in the relevant specialty (for Dental), or DM/MCh as specified for certain departments. All qualifications must be from NMC/MCI/DCI-recognized Universities/Institutes, and all requirements must be completed by 31-07-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for JIPMER Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 45 years as on 31-07-2026. Age relaxation is available: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 10 years for PwBD-UR/EWS, 13 years for PwBD-OBC, and 15 years for PwBD-SC/ST.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for JIPMER Senior Resident July 2026?
faq.answer: Rs. 500/- for General/OBC(NCL)/EWS candidates, Rs. 250/- for SC/ST candidates, and NIL for PwBD candidates. Payment is through SBI Collect only.

faq.question: Q7. What is the exam pattern for JIPMER Senior Resident Written Test?
faq.answer: The Written Test consists of 40 objective type (Single Best Response) questions from the concerned specialty, carrying 80 marks (2 marks each), with a duration of 60 minutes. There is no negative marking. The test is in English medium only.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for JIPMER Senior Resident July 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a Written Test (80% weightage) followed by an Interview (20% weightage). Candidates must score the minimum eligibility marks in the Written Test to qualify for the Interview: 40/80 for UR/EWS, 36/80 for UR-PwBD, and 32/80 for SC/ST/OBC.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates currently working in a Government hospital apply for JIPMER Senior Resident?
faq.answer: Yes, but they must produce a valid No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their present employer in the prescribed format (Annexure-IV) at the time of Interview/Certificate Verification. Without the NOC, they will not be allowed to appear for the Interview under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q10. Will SRs recruited at JIPMER Puducherry also work at the Karaikal campus?
faq.answer: Yes. All Senior Residents recruited at JIPMER Puducherry will be posted at the JIPMER Karaikal Campus on a rotation basis for a period of not less than 3 months at a stretch.
